    "The park was designed by the renowned landscape architect Frederick Law Olmsted, who also designed Central Park in New York City.",
    "The park was initially intended to be a large public park, but it was later reduced in size to accommodate the growing city.",

    "The park is also home to the Prospect Park Zoo, which was established in 1904."
